content.query:
--Data Source ADLS (Raw/Staging/Bronze Layer) -> Data Ingestion Layer (COPY INTO) -> Staging Layer (Raw/Bronze Landing Table) -> 
-- Processing/Curation/Silver Layer Incremental/Trunc load (Stored Procedure) -> Curated/Silver / Final Table (Curated Layer) -> Consumption/Analytical/Gold Layer (Mat view/Power BI)

CREATE TABLE bank_schema.stg_retail_txns
(
    txnid INT,
    txndate VARCHAR(20),
    custid INT,
    amt FLOAT,
    category VARCHAR(100),
    product VARCHAR(200),
    city VARCHAR(100),
    state VARCHAR(100),
    payment_mode VARCHAR(20)
)
WITH
(
    HEAP -- Simple as is storage without applying any storage algorithms, because this is just a staging/bronze ingestion layer
);

CREATE TABLE bank_schema.retail_txns
(
    txnid INT,
    txndate DATE,
    custid INT,
    amt FLOAT,
    category VARCHAR(100),
    product VARCHAR(200),
    city VARCHAR(100),
    state VARCHAR(100),
    payment_mode VARCHAR(20)
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX );

--ETL Using SP in Synapse Dedicated SQL WH (Not possible in serverless)
CREATE PROCEDURE bank_schema.sp_retail_curation
    @ProcessType NVARCHAR(20)
AS
BEGIN
    DECLARE @RowCount INT;

    -- 1. Check staging count
    SELECT @RowCount = COUNT(*) 
    FROM bank_schema.stg_retail_txns;

    -- 2. Empty check
    IF @RowCount = 0
    BEGIN
        PRINT 'No new retail data found in staging.';
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
        PRINT 'Found ' + CAST(@RowCount AS NVARCHAR(10)) + ' retail rows. Processing...';

        -- 3. INSERT (Incremental load) logic
        IF @ProcessType = 'INSERT'
        BEGIN
            INSERT INTO bank_schema.retail_txns
            SELECT
                txnid,
                TRY_CONVERT(DATE, txndate, 110), -- MM-DD-YYYY format
                custid,
                amt,
                category,
                product,
                city,
                state,
                payment_mode
            FROM bank_schema.stg_retail_txns;

            TRUNCATE TABLE bank_schema.stg_retail_txns;

            PRINT 'Insert completed. Rows processed: ' + CAST(@RowCount AS VARCHAR);
        END

        -- 4. RELOAD (Truncate & load) logic
        ELSE IF @ProcessType = 'RELOAD'
        BEGIN
            DELETE FROM bank_schema.retail_txns;

            INSERT INTO bank_schema.retail_txns
            SELECT
                txnid,
                TRY_CONVERT(DATE, txndate, 110),
                custid,
                amt,
                category,
                product,
                city,
                state,
                payment_mode
            FROM bank_schema.stg_retail_txns;

            PRINT 'Full reload completed successfully.';
        END

        ELSE
        BEGIN
            PRINT 'Invalid ProcessType. Use INSERT or RELOAD only.';
        END
    END
END;


INSERT INTO bank_schema.stg_retail_txns
VALUES (1, '06-26-2025', 4007024, 40.33, 'Exercise & Fitness', 'Cardio Machine Accessories', 'Clarksville', 'Tennessee', 'cash');
INSERT INTO bank_schema.stg_retail_txns
VALUES (2, '05-26-2025', 4006742, 198.44, 'Exercise & Fitness', 'Weightlifting Gloves', 'Long Beach', 'California', 'credit');


EXEC bank_schema.sp_retail_curation  @ProcessType = 'INSERT';
select * from bank_schema.retail_txns;

INSERT INTO bank_schema.stg_retail_txns
VALUES (3, '05-26-2025', 4006742, 198.44, 'Exercise & Fitness', 'Weightlifting Gloves', 'Long Beach', 'California', 'credit');

EXEC bank_schema.sp_retail_curation  @ProcessType = 'INSERT';
select * from bank_schema.retail_txns;


truncate table bank_schema.retail_txns;
truncate table bank_schema.stg_retail_txns;

INSERT INTO bank_schema.stg_retail_txns
VALUES (1, '06-26-2025', 4007024, 40.33, 'Exercise & Fitness', 'Cardio Machine Accessories', 'Clarksville', 'Tennessee', 'cash');
INSERT INTO bank_schema.stg_retail_txns
VALUES (2, '05-26-2025', 4006742, 198.44, 'Exercise & Fitness', 'Weightlifting Gloves', 'Long Beach', 'California', 'credit');

EXEC bank_schema.sp_retail_curation  @ProcessType = 'RELOAD';

INSERT INTO bank_schema.stg_retail_txns
VALUES (3, '05-26-2025', 4006742, 198.44, 'Exercise & Fitness', 'Weightlifting Gloves', 'Long Beach', 'California', 'credit');
update bank_schema.stg_retail_txns set amt=200.01 where txnid=2;

EXEC bank_schema.sp_retail_curation  @ProcessType = 'RELOAD';
